headline: SpaceX stock gains: What its IPO signals about its future success
summary: SpaceX stock (SPCX) continues rising in Monday's pre-market trading (maintaining gains at the session open at the time of this video's posting) ahead of the space company's first full day of trading since its historic IPO last Friday. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Barron's Investor Circle Newsletter editor Josh Schafer examine SpaceX's performance thus far and what it may signal about the success of the company in its future lifetime.

headline: If You Put $500 a Month into This Tech ETF Since 2016, You Could Retire Tomorrow
summary: Drop $500 into the VanEck Semiconductor ETF (NYSEARCA:SMH) starting in June, 2016, add another $500 every month, and the math pegs the account at $495,000 this week. summary: Famed short seller Jim Chanos criticized the SpaceX IPO just days before, calling the ~$1.75 trillion valuation at $135 per share driven more by “hopes and dreams” than realistic financial assumptions.

content.title: Famed Short Seller Jim Chanos Calls SpaceX IPO Fueled by Hopes and Dreams, Not Reality
content.summary: Famed short seller Jim Chanos criticized the SpaceX IPO just days before, calling the ~$1.75 trillion valuation at $135 per share driven more by “hopes and dreams” than realistic financial assumptions.

thumbnail.caption: Image of CEO Elon Musk by Kathy Hutchins via Shutterstock
